description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable magazine, reminiscent of the AK-47 design. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear of the barrel. The rifle features a prominent gas tube above the barrel and a slanted muzzle device at the tip. The trigger, magazine release, and safety selector are all visible on the side profile. The overall finish is a combination of matte black metal and medium brown wood, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The proportions and details suggest it is designed for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine, featuring iron sights and a slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the wooden handguard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden stock, curved magazine, trigger, and full receiver profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock, rear sight, and the symmetry of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, stock, and receiver details from the other side.
